notes: New 'Instruments' page — a dedicated, user-friendly home for managing existing investments and EMIs (no longer buried in Edit my inputs). Added to the sidebar (Configure group) and the mobile drawer. Shows each investment and EMI as a card with a status badge (Active / Closes <month> / N changes), inline-editable fields (balance, monthly contribution, rate for investments; EMI amount, start month, term for loans), and a 'Manage timeline' button that opens the Phase 1 lifecycle editor (step-up / pause / resume / close). Changes save IMMEDIATELY and recompute the Projection + Net Worth instantly (fintech-style) — no whole-form re-save. Adding/removing instruments still lives in Edit my inputs (clear division: setup there, manage here). The timeline editor now supports a state-bound mode so edits on this page persist and recompute directly.
